message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface IEvent {
  IgnoreThis : bool <<get>> <<set>>
  IsSystemMessage : bool <<get>> <<set>>
}

class "EventHelpers" <<static>> {
  + GetPlayer(event:IEvent, GetPlayerFunc:Func<VersaCommsID, TPlayer>) : TPlayer
  + GetPlayerID(evnt:IEvent) : VersaCommsID
  + GetEntity(event:IEvent, getEntityFunc:Func<VersaCommsID, TEntity>) : TEntity
  + GetEntityID(evnt:IEvent) : VersaCommsID
  + GetScenario(evnt:IEvent, getScenarioFunction:Func<VersaCommsID, TScenario>) : TScenario
  + GetScenarioID(evnt:IEvent) : VersaCommsID
}

class "UnionType`2" as UnionType2
class "IList`1" as IList1
class IEventPipe
class IServiceProvider

IEvent --> UnionType2 : Scenario<VersaCommsID,TScenario>,\nPlayer<VersaCommsID,TPlayer>,\nEntity<VersaCommsID,TEntity>,\nTerminal<VersaCommsID,TTerminal>
IEvent --> IList1 : IEventPipeCommands<ICommandGroup>
IEvent --> IEventPipe : Services
IEvent --> IServiceProvider

@enduml
